title: stelis dolichopus
intro: Stelis dolichopus is a type of orchid plant, a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis dolichopus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
